channel.title: Geek Friday
channel.itunes:author: Faith E. Korpi and Jason Seifer
channel.itunes:subtitle: Geek Friday is a weekly show where we explore, discuss, and reality check your favorite Geek topics.
channel.itunes:summary: Geek Friday is a weekly show where we explore, discuss, and reality check your favorite Geek topics from technology to television, music, movies, comics, gear, and more.
channel.description: Geek Friday is a weekly show where we explore, discuss, and reality check your favorite Geek topics from technology to television, music, movies, comics, gear, and more.

itunes:owner.itunes:name: Faith E. Korpi and Jason Seifer

item.title: Episode 92: It's not Goodbye, It's Changing a Feed
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
Geek Friday, sadly, has come to an end.

 But it's not goodbye! We're starting a new show. 

Check us out at IRLTalk. 

In the mean time, enjoy this best of episode that Faith has put together.  

It's been real, folks.
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 91: It’s For Acoustic Reasons, Not Personal Reasons
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about Super hero movies, Twitter, and they get a little weird.

  • My Dick
  • 5 Batmobiles through the years | New York Post
  • 5 Batmobiles through the years | New York Post
  • SUPERHEROES: A Never-Ending Battle | PBS Arts | PBS
  • Ant-Man: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Paul Rudd Front-Runners for Role (EXCLUSIVE) | Variety
  • AntMan.png (1024×724)
  • Marvel reportedly prepping new suite of original shows for streaming services | The Verge
  • Emoji News . Net
  • Twitter now lets you receive direct messages from any follower | The Verge
  • Robots Podcast: Giving rights to robots | Robohub
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 90: Want to go Halfsies on an Island?
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about buying a private island, texting animated GIFs, funny stock photos, and more. There's also a rather exhaustive review of iOS 7. 

  • iPhone 5S, 5C Drop Tests Reveal True Value of Apple's New Cases
  • TidBITS: 39-Word Review of the $39 iPhone 5s Case
  • iPhone and iPad users report severe motion sickness while using iOS 7 | The Verge
  • Islands for Sale Worldwide - Private Islands Online
  • Custom Prank Gag Gift 'World Map' Shower by AndrewSaginor
  • GIF Finder for iPhone, iPad, and iPod touch on the iTunes App Store
  • Want Some Ketchup With Those Noodles? The Best in Absurd Stock Photography | Raw File | Wired.com
  • Why We're Shutting Off Our Comments | Popular Science
  • ? "Weird Al" Yankovic: Alapalooza - Frank's 2000" TV - YouTube
  • Texas Motor Speedway's 'Big Hoss TV' will be the world's largest HD screen
  • Facebook, other banned sites to be open in China free trade zone: report | Reuters
  • Amazon's Kindle Fire HDX: power, with a helping hand | The Verge
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 89: Swag On
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about job interview questions, montage music, and more.

  • Facebook Has a Quarter of a Trillion User Photos

  • Mix tape, anyone? The cassette turns 50 - CNN.com
  • Soldiers Feel Loss, Anger When Their Robots Die
  • 'Grand Theft Auto V' Sales Hit $800 Million in One Day
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 88: Do You Know How Many Rides In The Teleporter That Would Buy?!
item.dc:creator: Faith Korpi
item.description:

item.title: Episode 87: Sometimes the Situation Just Calls For Emoji
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about first world problems, Faith erasing her phone again, emojis as a communication medium, email anxiety, and more.

item.title: Episode 86: Underneath the Jokes, There's Feels
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
Faith and Jason are back! In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about gold iPhones, Batman, GIFs, Star Wars, and more.

They also share random musings.

 

  • ? How Man Of Steel Should Have Ended - YouTube
  • Coming Soon: A Back to the Future Documentary Inspired by a Bar Mitzvah Video | Underwire | Wired.com
  • Back To The Future | Line.do - An easy-to-use and free timeline tool
  • Star Wars: Episode VII To Shoot On 35mm | Movie News | Empire
  • Star Wars: Episode VII (2015) - IMDb
  • Google Maps
  • Google Street View looks inside the TARDIS - Telegraph

    • YouTube, which is owned by Google, also added a series of hidden features to its site to celebrate its ‘Geek Week’ last week.

  • Say 'Prunes', Not 'Cheese': The History of Smiling in Photographs
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 78: Hold On, It’s My Internet Watch
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about Mutant Rights, texting at the bar and beer glasses that avoid it, real life horror movies, and more.

Oh, and there is a review and discussion WITH SPOILERS of Man of Steel.

item.title: Longtroll Karaoke
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
This is the karaoke version of the long troll that Jason performed in episodes 71 - 75. We hope you enjoy it.

For those of you who would like to have followed along, here are the time markers that Jason kept for the snippets. They are a bit out of tune with the actual episode times because of the delay that the theme song and other editing add:

  • 72 - 19:41, 28:46, 38:00, 43:43, 53:00, 54:13
  • 73 - 16:10, 30:03, 44:00
  • 74 - 17:30, 22:40, 25:00, 38:01, 47:00, 52:51
  • 75 - 08:15, 27:35, 34:13, 40:43, 41:00, 42:15, 44:13, 48:40, 50:18, 51:57, 52:45, 53:08, 54:29, 54:54, 55:05, 55:44, 57:47, 58:13, 58:33
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 75: Never Try To Understand Where Internet Commenters Are Coming From

item.title: Episode 74: Dude I Googled It
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about the correct pronunciation of GIF, Yahoo!'s Tumblr acquisition, and more.

This episode contains spoilers for Star Trek: Into Darkness.

item.title: Episode 72: Somewhere Out There Is a Picture of The Internet
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
Faith and Jason are back! In this episode of Geek Friday, Faith and Jason talk about Zach Braff's Kickstarter, summer movie memories, paying for web sites, and more.

These are the news and links for Geek Friday #72, recorded on Friday, May 10, 2013.

  • Noteness | the MS-Diary for iPhone, iPod Touch
  • Anthony Thompson - Google+ - Repost from Reddit. I have to agree with this guy. P.S. I…
  • By Ken Levine: I won't give Zach Braff one dime
  • Zach Braff Responds to Kickstarter Critics
  • Are You Ready to Pay for YouTube? - Adam Clark Estes - The Atlantic Wire
  • Skip Past the Boring Intro on YouTube Videos with the Wadsworth Constant Bookmarklet
  • The Most Gnarly 1980s Sci-Fi Movie Posters! - IGN
  • BQ&A: Faith E. Korpi, Half of 'Geek Friday' — BitQuill
  • BQ&A: Jason Seifer — Master Prankster, Half of Geek Friday, and So Much More — BitQuill
  • Trust Me, I'm Faith
  • Make Perfect Work Schedules - Scheduling Employee Scheduling Software
  • Geek Friday Dot Com
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.title: Episode 71: Is That the Internet Watch?
item.dc:creator: Jason Seifer
item.description:
In this episode of Geek Friday, Jason and Faith talk about Facebook Home, movie and TV pilots, Zach Braff's Kickstarter, The Internet™, and more. Oh and Jason reviews the Pebble watch and there will be no Geek Friday next week.
  • Facebook Home over a week later: only 500K installs and a two-star user rating | VentureBeat
  • top 50 beers in the world - ratebeer best 2013
  • BBC News - Amazon to pilot TV comedies and children's shows online
  • Geek Friday - Google+
  • Would Anyone Care If Your Startup Disappeared? - Alex's Tech Thoughts
  • WISH I WAS HERE by Zach Braff — Kickstarter
  • Garden State (2004) - IMDb
  • The Future, Obviously (Chapter Two)
  • Lessons from the sorority-girl e-mail rant - CNN.com
  • The Most Deranged Sorority Girl Email You Will Ever Read
  • Michael Shannon Reads the Insane Delta Gamma Sorority Letter from Michael Shannon, Bryan, Danny Jelinek, Funny Or Die, and Betsy Koch
item.itunes:author: Geek Friday

item.itunes:summary: In this episode of Geek Friday, Jason and Faith talk about Facebook Home, movie and TV pilots, Zach Braff's Kickstarter, The Internet™, and more.
